mission.title: argo: Argo CD UI getting logged out in 5 mins while integrated with keycloak
mission.description: Argo CD UI getting logged out in 5 mins while integrated with keycloak. This issue affects 94+ users.

steps.title: Identify argo feature symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your argo deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo -l app=argo
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo -n argo --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors related to: Argo CD UI getting logged out in 5 mins while integrated with keycloak

steps.title: Check current argo configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant argo configuration:
**Issue**
We have installed Argo CD of version 2.5.3. We have integrated Argo CD with keycloak following the steps in https://argo-cd.readthedocs.io/en/stable/operator-manual/user-management/keycloak/#integrating-keycloak-and-argocd
With this integration when I login to the Argo CD UI via keycloak,

steps.title: Apply the fix for Argo CD UI getting logged out in 5 mins while integrated
steps.description:
Another workaround: Instead using the native OIDC support of argo-cd, we could use Dex as an intermediate.

For example, instead of configuring this...

```yaml
oidc.config:
  name: Company-SSO
  issuer: https://company-keycloak/realms/some-realm
  clientID: argocd
  cliClientID: argocd-cli
 
```yaml
oidc.config: |
  skipAudienceCheckWhenTokenHasNoAudience: true
```

steps.title: Confirm Argo CD UI getting logged out in 5 mins while is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo -n argo --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n argo --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
The root cause is: Another workaround: Instead using the native OIDC support of argo-cd, we could use Dex as an intermediate.

For example, instead of configuring this...

```yaml
oidc.config:
  name: Company-SSO
  issuer: https://company-keycloak/realms/some-realm
  clientID: argocd
  cliClientID: argocd-cli
  clientSecret: $oidc.keycloak.clientSecret
  requestedScopes: ["openid", "microprofile-jwt"]
```

We would.
codeSnippets:
oidc.config: |
              name: OIDC name
              issuer: https://oidc.url
              clientID: $oidc-secret:oidc.clientID
              clientSecret: $oidc-secret:oidc.clientSecret
              requestedScopes: ["openid"]

## Server service configuration
          service:
            # -- Used to maintain session affinity. Supports `ClientIP` and `None`
            sessionAffinity: "ClientIP"

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with argo installed or the issue environment reproducible.
